findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: extcodesize as EOA/contract check -> zkSync & native-AA: EOAs can have code and a counterfactual smart-account has none; auth/signature gates on 'isContract' are bypassable

findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: extcodesize as EOA/contract check -> zkSync & native-AA: EOAs can have code and a counterfactual smart-account has none; auth/signature gates on 'isContract' are bypassable

findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: extcodesize as EOA/contract check -> zkSync & native-AA: EOAs can have code and a counterfactual smart-account has none; auth/signature gates on 'isContract' are bypassable

findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: address.code.length as an EOA/contract check -> unreliable on AA chains (zkSync)

findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: custom isContract() -> if it branches signature/auth verification, the EOA-vs-smart-account split breaks on zkSync AA (cf. zkMarkets TransactFacet.verifySignature)

findings.title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
findings.note: custom isContract() -> if it branches signature/auth verification, the EOA-vs-smart-account split breaks on zkSync AA (cf. zkMarkets TransactFacet.verifySignature)
